## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope

- [ ] Backend only
- [ ] Frontend only
- [ ] Full-stack (API + UI)
- [ ] Docs / tooling only

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references to similar products.
